name: claude-code-philosophy
description: A reusable agent design skill inspired by Claude Code-class agent systems.

interface.shortDescription: Design better agents with stronger harness thinking
interface.longDescription: A plugin that teaches practical, vendor-neutral design patterns for useful, controllable, extensible agentic products and coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Design Coach to turn this vague agent idea into a real system design.
Use Agent Design Coach to review this coding agent architecture for harness, tools, memory, and UX gaps.
Use Agent Design Coach to design a safer and more useful agent product.
